RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Optimize resource locking for one Task simple S/R configs
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The behavior of RTE-18341 has been extended to cover scenarios where a participating RunnableEntity has both read and write access. Additionally the consistency in resource protection for immaterial configuration changes has been improved.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Set the update flag in resource protection with tranformation
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: RTA-RTE now sets the update flag(s) in the same concurrency protection as the global data is copied into the RTE managed global buffer in COM/LdCom callbacks where transformation is configured.
